UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 39 6TH ST LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEJIA, MARY BETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 41 6TH STREET, UNIT 5, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210029411)
